title: SQL: schema change makes server prone for kill (meltdown)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (ref_id INTEGER, description TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
INSERT INTO test_table2 (ref_id, description) VALUES (1, NULL);
key_bug_features: schema change causes server vulnerability to kill
